nl_query: Which programs have prerequisite relationships defined in the system?
failed_sql: SELECT DISTINCT au_from.code AS program_code FROM academic_unit_relationship aur JOIN relationship_type_config rtc ON rtc.relationship_type = aur.relationship_type WHERE rtc.relationship_type = 'PREREQUISITE' AND rtc.from_unit_type = 'COURSE' AND rtc.to_unit_type = 'COURSE' AND aur.is_active = TRUE;
